name: nat-vent-evening-activation
description: Evening cool-down: outdoor 70F < indoor 76F — nat vent activates for free cooling

verdict.summary: When outdoor is cooler than indoor and below threshold, nat vent activates
verdict.observed_behavior: natural_ventilation with outdoor < indoor and outdoor < threshold
verdict.expected_behavior: natural_ventilation with outdoor < indoor and outdoor < threshold

events.note: evening: indoor at comfort_cool ceiling, outdoor 6F cooler — nat vent eligible. comfort_cool raised to 76 (Issue #392: reactivation gates now also require indoor <= ceiling_threshold for the default/HVAC-fan archetype used here — this scenario tests directional activation, not the ceiling gate)

assertions.reason: outdoor 70F < indoor 76F (beneficial direction); outdoor 70F < threshold 79F; indoor 76F > comfort_heat 70F; indoor 76F <= ceiling_threshold 76F — nat vent activates
